titles.text: Suna no Embrace - Eden no Sato no Never
砂のエンブレイス：エディンの里のネーブル

roms.name: Suna no Embrace - Eden no Sato no Never (Japan)

descriptions.text: A RPG set in a desert fantasy world where water is the most valued resource.

It is said that there is an unknown land somewhere in Neverland. The land goes by the name Eden. It is an arid land, for it is where the Gods of Sand and Wind live harmoniously as husband and wife. Very few people call it home, for those who lay eyes upon it soon tire of its wastelands that stretch to the very end of the world.
The sands and winds yet dance about in Eden, as if they had forgotten the passage of time...
